case_title: BRITTANY JOHNSON VS. DEMIGOD LOVE LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-18-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-18-2023 BY JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY. PLAINTIFF BRITTANY JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AT 8:59AM DUE TO TRAFFIC. COURT VERIFIED AND DETERMINED PROOF OF SERVICE IS VALID. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD E. QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,030.36 FILED BY JOHNSON, BRITTANY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRITTANY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-02-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-18-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRITTANY JOHNSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC IS NOT PRESENT. THE RETURN CERTIFIED PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT VALID. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE WAS SERVED BUT THE DEFENDANT WAS NOT INDICATED ON THE GREEN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD. PLIANTIFF'S CLAIM NEEDS TO BE RESERVED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF [AGENT FOR SERVICE: LEGAL CORP SOLUTIONS, INC] SERVED OCT-12-2022, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRITTANY AS TO DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE FEB-09-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEMIGOD LOVE LLC (ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNABLE TO FORWARD)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JOHNSON, BRITTANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEMIGOD LOVE LLC $4,030.36 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,095.36 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER OF CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-18-2023 - JUDGMENT.
